records.title: Sword Slash 2 (Game Short)
records.description: A short sound effect suitable for games.

records.title: Sword Slash (Monster)
records.description: A sound of slashing a monster.

records.title: Sword Slash (Flurry Attack)
records.description: A flurry attack sound, 5 consecutive slashes.

records.title: Sword Slash (Charged Attack)
records.description: A sound of slashing after charging power.

records.title: Greatsword Slash
records.description: A slash from a nearly 3m long greatsword, utilizing its weight to strike down.

records.title: Sword Draw
records.description: A sharp, resonant metallic sound of drawing a sword.

records.title: Sword Sheathe
records.description: The sound of a sword being sheathed with a varied tempo, ending with a "pachin".

records.title: Sword Fight Clash
records.description: Sounds of swords clashing violently multiple times.

records.title: Sword Clash 1 (Sharp High Pitch)
records.description: A sharp, high-pitched sword clashing sound.

records.title: Sword Clash 3 (Ground Shaking)
records.description: An impact sound of swords clashing, strong enough to shake the ground.

records.title: Sword Swing 1 (Greatsword)
records.description: The sound of swinging a greatsword.

records.title: Sword Swing 2
records.description: The sound of swinging a sword.

records.title: Sword Swing 3 (Small Sword)
records.description: The sound of swinging a small sword.

records.title: Armored Knight Walking
records.description: A rattling ("gacha-gacha") sound of an armored knight walking.

records.title: Armored Knight Running
records.description: A sound of an armored knight running, recorded by someone actually wearing armor.

records.title: Shield Block
records.description: A sound of defending with a shield, implying an impenetrable defense.

records.title: Katana Slash 1 (Period Drama)
records.description: A slashing sound for period dramas (jidaigeki).

records.title: Katana Slash 3 (Tearing)
records.description: A sound of slashing and tearing.

records.title: Katana Slash 4 (Thrusting)
records.description: A slashing sound with an image of thrusting.

records.title: Katana Slash 5 (Razor Sharp)
records.description: A slashing sound from an extremely sharp katana.

records.title: Katana Swing 1
records.description: The sound of a katana swing (practice).

records.title: Katana Swing 2 (Pyu Sound)
records.description: A "pyu" sound of a katana swing.

records.title: Katana Continuous Swings
records.description: Continuous katana swings, depicting constant evasion of an opponent's sword.

records.title: Iaido Draw Slash 1
records.description: An "issen" (flash) sound of an iaido draw and slash.

records.title: Katana Ready Stance
records.description: A "chaki" sound of taking a ready stance with a katana.

records.title: Katana Sheathe 1 (Pachin)
records.description: A "pachin" sound of a katana being sheathed.

records.title: Katana Sheathe 2 (Chain)
records.description: A "chain" sound of a katana being sheathed.

records.title: Katana Clash 1 (Jidaigeki Chanbara)
records.description: A "chanbara" (sword fight) sound for period dramas.

records.title: Katana Clash 4 (Blocked Attack)
records.description: A sound of a katana attack being parried/repelled.

records.title: Holding Scabbard
records.description: A sound of metal fittings rattling while holding a scabbard.

records.title: Knife Cut
records.description: A light slashing sound from a knife.

records.title: Knife Stab 1 (With Blood)
records.description: A knife stabbing sound, including the sound of blood.

records.title: Knife Stab 2 (Dull Sound)
records.description: A dull stabbing sound from a knife.

records.title: Knife Stab 3 (Gusah Sound)
records.description: A "gusah" sound of a knife stabbing.

records.title: Axe Slash 1 (Powerful Heavy Hit)
records.description: A powerful, heavy slashing hit from an axe.

records.title: Axe Slash 2 (Critical Hit)
records.description: An axe slashing sound for a critical hit.

records.title: Whip Attack 1 (Authentic Crack)
records.description: An authentic crackling sound of a real whip.

records.title: Whip Attack 2 (Supersonic Tip)
records.description: A whip attack sound where the tip breaks the sound barrier.

records.title: Whip Attack 5 (Echo, Queen)
records.description: A whip attack sound with echo, evoking an image of a queen.

records.title: Dragon Roar 1
records.description: Can also be used for dinosaur or monster voices

records.title: Dragon Roar 2
records.description: Shorter. Has a giant creature feel

records.title: Kaiju Footsteps
records.description: Heavy thud causing ground to shake

records.title: Sleeping Monster
records.title_ja: 眠りこけるモンスター

records.title: Dracula Wing Flap
records.title_ja: ドラキュラの羽ばたき

records.title: Ground Tremor
records.description: Ground cracks due to immense weight

records.title: Human Monster Transformation
records.title_ja: 人がモンスターに変化

records.title: Impact Hit 2
records.description: Easy to use for general attacks

records.title: Rock Splitting
records.title_ja: 岩が真っ二つに割れる

records.title: Plastic Bottle Crush
records.title_ja: ペットボトルを握りつぶす

records.title: Japanese Drum Roll
records.description: Can also be used for entrance direction

records.title: Japanese Drum Rimshot
records.description: Hitting the rim of the drum

records.title: Trumpet Fanfare
records.title_ja: ラッパのファンファーレ

records.title: Cursed Melody
records.description: A dramatic melody, suitable for scenes of failure or a bad omen.

records.title: Cymbal Roll End
records.description: Cymbal hit to end a roll, also suitable for character entrances.

records.title: Sharp Fanfare Reveal
records.description: A sharp, impactful sound for introducing something new or making a reveal.

records.title: Grand Intro Fanfare
records.description: A grand fanfare suitable for introductions, entrances, and various dramatic productions.

records.title: Comedy Punchline 1
records.description: A classic comedic ending tune, played on xylophone, perfect for punchlines.

records.title: Comedy Skit Ending 2
records.description: A comedic ending tune, suitable for closing skits and comedy routines.

records.title: Showa Comedy Ending 3
records.description: A comedic ending tune with a Showa-era feel, featuring a trumpet.

records.title: Powerful Impact Hit
records.description: A heavy, impactful sound created by simultaneously striking Japanese drums and vibraslap.

records.title: Male Crowd Shout 'Ooh!'
records.description: A boisterous shout from a group of enthusiastic men.

records.title: Female Crowd Cheer 'Oh!'
records.description: A cute and spirited cheer from a group of women.

records.title: Male Crowd Shout 'Yay!'
records.description: A big cheer of 'Yay!' from an all-male crowd.

records.title: Male Crowd Shout 'Yahoo!'
records.description: An explosive shout of 'Yahoo!' from a group of men, expressing extreme joy.

records.title: Male Crowd Shout 'Katsu!'
records.description: A sharp, spirited shout of 'Katsu!' from a group of men, used for reprimand or encouragement.

records.title: Celebration Fanfare Drums
records.description: A celebratory fanfare with drums and horns, perfect for livening up videos.

records.title: Single Horn Honk
records.description: A short, single honk from a horn.

records.title: Toy Hammer Squeak
records.description: A squeaky sound from a toy hammer.

records.title: Ramen Cart Melody
records.title_ja: ラーメン屋台のメロディ
records.description: A traditional melody played by ramen street vendors, existing since the Edo period.

records.title: DJ Turntable Scratch 1
records.description: A classic DJ scratching sound, suitable for music programs.

records.title: DJ Record Backspin 2
records.description: A DJ record backspin sound effect.

records.title: Xylophone Scene Transition 1
records.description: A gentle scene transition sound, played on xylophone.

records.title: Heavy Scene Transition 2
records.description: A heavy, resonant sound for scene changes.

records.title: Cash Register Amount
records.description: The sound of an amount being displayed or confirmed on a cash register.

records.title: Cuckoo Clock Chime 1
records.description: The classic 'bong' and 'cuckoo' sounds of a cuckoo clock.

records.title: Cuckoo Clock Cuckoo 2
records.description: Multiple 'cuckoo' sounds from a cuckoo clock.

records.title: Typewriter Typing Sound 1
records.title_ja: タイプライターで文字を打つ1
records.description: Typewriter sounds, suitable for title displays or text animations.

records.title: Typewriter Continuous Typing 2
records.title_ja: タイプライターで文字を打つ2
records.description: Continuous typing sounds from a typewriter.

records.title: Refreshing Title Display
records.description: A refreshing and crisp sound, ideal for title displays in business or general productions.

records.title: Deep Piano Single Note
records.description: A single, deeply resonant piano note for calm and contemplative scenes.

records.title: Anxiety Piano Melody
records.description: A piano melody evoking anxiety, suggesting an ominous event is about to occur.

records.title: Bell Ring with Reverb
records.description: A single bell ring with a gentle reverb effect.

records.title: Period Drama Vibraslap 1
records.description: A dramatic vibraslap sound, commonly used in Japanese period dramas.

records.title: Period Drama Quijada 2
records.description: A sharp quijada sound, frequently used in Japanese period dramas for emphasis.

records.title: Period Drama Quijada 3
records.description: A concise, sharp quijada sound, typical for dramatic accents in period dramas.

records.title: Koto Glissando Sound
records.description: A flowing glissando played on a koto, a traditional Japanese stringed instrument.

records.title: Kotsuzumi Theatre Drum
records.description: The distinctive sound of a kotsuzumi, a small shoulder drum used in traditional Kabuki and Noh theatre.

records.title: Shakuhachi Flute Live
records.description: Live performance of a shakuhachi, a traditional Japanese bamboo flute known for its difficulty.

records.title: Hyoshigi Wooden Clapper 1
records.description: The crisp sound of hyoshigi, traditional Japanese wooden clappers.

records.title: Hyoshigi Double Clapper 2
records.description: Two sharp, consecutive hits from hyoshigi clappers.

records.title: Hyoshigi Rhythmic Clapper 3
records.description: A rhythmic sequence of hits from hyoshigi clappers.

records.title: Emergency Alarm Sound
records.description: An alarm sound, effective for building tension before dangerous scenes.
